{{Infobox artifact
| name = Mercy's staff
| introduced = Skysworn
}}

== Skysworn ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Mercy's staff]] has a [[dragon]]'s head that snarls and has violet lights for eyes.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c15">''Skysworn'', chapter 15</ref>}}

== Ghostwater ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Mercy]] has a staff made of polished black roots with a [[dragon]] head top.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c2">''Ghostwater'', chapter 2</ref>}}

== Underlord ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Mercy]] possesses a braided black staff.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c2">''Underlord'', chapter 2</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Mercy]] used her staff like a walking stick.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c4">''Underlord'', chapter 4</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Skysworn]]
[[Category:Ghostwater]]
[[Category:Underlord]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle artifacts]]
